message:
bd-1qqi: reject series_join cross and add negative packet coverage

What changed:
- Added `require_series_join_type(...)` in `fp-conformance` to enforce pandas parity for
  `series_join`: only `inner|left|right|outer` are accepted.
- Added expected-error-aware execution flow for `FixtureOperation::SeriesJoin` in both:
  - `run_fixture_operation`
  - `execute_and_compare_differential`
  This ensures negative fixtures (`expected_error_contains` / `expected_error_any`) are
  evaluated correctly instead of failing early during precondition checks.
- Added new packet fixture:
  - `fp_p2c_004_series_join_cross_rejected_strict.json`
  covering `join_type: cross` rejection behavior.

Validation:
- `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_redraven cargo test -p fp-conformance packet_filter_runs_join_packet -- --nocapture`
- `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_redraven cargo run -p fp-conformance --bin fp-conformance-cli -- --packet-id FP-P2C-004 --oracle fixture --require-green`
- `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_redraven cargo run -p fp-conformance --bin fp-conformance-cli -- --packet-id FP-P2C-004 --oracle live --allow-system-pandas-fallback --require-green`
- `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_redraven cargo check --workspace --all-targets`
- `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_redraven cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `rch exec -- cargo fmt`
- `rch exec -- cargo fmt --check`
- `UBS_MAX_DIR_SIZE_MB=0 ubs --staged .` (baseline pre-existing warnings remain)
